历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14434 → 15251 → 14686 → 23071 → 16966, with significant fluctuations in the past 5 years; in 2024, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a sharp decline to 23071, and in 2025, it rebounded significantly to 16966, with a cumulative increase of about 6105 places in the past 2 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 16966; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 102 → 100 → 108 → 114 → 122, with continuous slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 152, an increase of 30 (+24.6%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 63rd on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 60-65 range in recent years; recent reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity ranking 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of 626,000, gaining some attention on short video platforms; no records of enrollment gaps; Hydraulic Engineering A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, with water-related majors being the university's flagship, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of major enrollment categories at Hohai University, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, remains high; the total number of Hubei Province college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 393,700, with an estimated 236,000 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 60%, a decrease of about 5.4% from 249,800 in 2025, with a slight decline in candidate numbers; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 426, with little fluctuation in recent years; Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hubei Province (152 in Physics Category in 2026), making it one of the institutions with more plans among cross-provincial enrollments, with no obvious suppression of regional preference for Hubei candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 16966, the significant 24.6% expansion in 2026 (increasing ranking number), the approximately 5.4% decrease in Hubei Physics Category candidates (decreasing ranking number), and the sustained high popularity of majors, the expansion effect dominates but is offset by the decrease in candidates; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 19269, with a range of 18769-19769.
